about.title: About Kyrgyz Heritage
about.subtitle: A community-driven platform dedicated to preserving and documenting the rich cultural heritage of Kyrgyzstan for future generations.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To create a comprehensive digital archive of Kyrgyzstan's cultural heritage sites, rituals, and oral traditions, ensuring they are preserved and accessible for generations to come.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: A world where Kyrgyz cultural heritage is celebrated, understood, and protected through community engagement and modern technology.

preservation.title: Preservation
preservation.description: We work with local communities, historians, and cultural experts to document and preserve traditional knowledge, rituals, and historical sites.

community.title: Community
community.description: Our platform is built by and for the community. Anyone can contribute by submitting sites, sharing stories, or helping verify information.

about.ways_to_contribute: There are many ways to contribute to the preservation of Kyrgyzstan's cultural heritage:

contribute_list.1: Submit heritage sites you know about
contribute_list.2: Share oral histories and traditional knowledge
contribute_list.4: Spread the word about our platform

about.contact_text: Have questions or want to get involved? Reach out to us:

about.title: About Amanat
about.subtitle: Preserving the sacred heritage of Kyrgyzstan for future generations
about.amanat_meaning: Amanat is something entrusted for safekeeping, a legacy we must pass on to future generations.
about.sacred_heritage_desc: Sacred mountains, mazars, springs, and places of power
about.traditions_desc: Rituals and customs passed down from generation to generation
about.oral_histories_desc: Legends, stories, and tales from elders
about.sacred_categories_desc: We document various types of sacred places throughout Kyrgyzstan

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To create a comprehensive digital archive of Kyrgyzstan's sacred places, rituals, and oral traditions, ensuring their preservation and accessibility for future generations.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: A world where the sacred heritage of the Kyrgyz people is valued, understood, and protected through community engagement and modern technology.

about.ways_to_contribute: There are many ways to contribute to preserving Kyrgyzstan's sacred heritage:

contribute_list.1: Submit sacred places you know about
contribute_list.2: Share oral histories and traditional knowledge
contribute_list.4: Tell friends and family about the project
